arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy ‘disappointed’ and ‘hurt’ after cutting ties with Man Utd
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy returned to United as Erik ten Hag’s assistant in the summer and had a four-game interim spell following his compatriot’s sacking.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits he was left 'HURT' and 'disappointed' by Man United axe, but new Leicester boss explains why he's 'grateful' to Ruben Amorim still
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy, one of the finest forwards in United's history, had taken interim charge following the sacking of Ten Hag, but new boss Ruben Amorim decided he would not be part of his coaching plans.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's email to supporters revealed after controversial ticket price changes
arts.sum: Last week Manchester United announced the decision to raise the price of home tickets to £66 a match - with no concessions for children or pensioners - before angry fan groups protested during the weekend win over Everton

arts.ttl: Man United 'open talks to sign Viktor Gyokeres' in bid to reunite the Sporting Lisbon star with Ruben Amorim - but major hurdle 'stands in their way'
arts.sum: Gyokeres is one of the most in-form and highly sought-after stars in Europe currently, having netted 24 goals in just 21 games so far in all competitions so far this season.

arts.ttl: Adam Wharton Arsenal transfer would make sense – Charles Watts column
arts.sum: Arsenal have got their mojo back, but is it too late for a title challenge? Last week was a hell of a week for Arsenal. The win against Nottingham Forest was good, but the manner in which they brushed Sporting and West Ham aside was very, very impressive. They have got their mojo back. arts.ttl: Man United opens FA Cup title defense at Arsenal and Man City to play 'Class of 92'-owned Salford
arts.sum: Among the best were Tamworth, one of only two non-league clubs in the draw, getting to host Tottenham and Manchester City at home to Salford City — the team owned by members of Man United’s famed “Class of 92” such as Ryan Giggs and Gary Neville. Manchester United will start its FA Cup title defense with a trip to Arsenal in a third-round draw containing a host of intriguing English Premier League vs.

arts.ttl: 'I don't like it': Ruben Amorim explains why he's not a fan of Manchester United chant
arts.sum: New Red Devils boss would rather supporters focused on praising his players

arts.ttl: 2024/25 FA Cup third round draw: Arsenal host Man Utd; Chelsea & Liverpool draw League Two clubs
arts.sum: The two Premier League giants meet on Wednesday night and were pitted against each other in a cup tie which inspired gasps from the crowd watching the draw at United's home stadium. The top two tiers of England's footballing pyramid flooded the nation's oldest competition as the 2024/25 FA Cup third round draw was made on Monday evening at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man City, Man Utd Take Lead in Transfer Race for Barcelona, PSG’s €70M-Rated Target
arts.sum: As 2025 approaches, Viktor Gyökeres is drawing interest from several top European clubs, with Sporting Lisbon reportedly willing to sell their star striker. However, one club seems to be ahead in the race for the Swedish forward.
